Introduction
Stroke treatment decisions depend on the affected population, treatment window, and expected outcome.

Methods
Patients were enrolled consecutively. Outcomes were assessed at 90 days by trained investigators.

Results
Of 100 enrolled patients, 80 completed follow-up. Functional independence occurred in 32 of 80 patients (40.0%).

Discussion
The observed association may help define a testable prognostic question. However, the single-center design limits transportability.
